channel.title: Lumework Blog
channel.description: Practical guides on website costs, local SEO and getting found online in South Africa.

item.title: How Much Does a Website Cost in South Africa? (2026 Prices)
item.description: Real ZAR price bands for DIY builders, freelancers and agencies, plus the hidden costs nobody puts in the quote.

item.title: How to Set Up Google Business Profile in South Africa (And Actually Rank)
item.description: Verification, category selection, and the factors that really decide who ranks in the local map pack.

item.title: The Website Setup That Actually Gets Plumbers Called
item.description: What customers with a burst geyser at 6am actually look for, and why most trade websites never generate a call.

item.title: Do You Actually Need a Website If You Have a Facebook Page?
item.description: An honest comparison, including the cases where a Facebook page genuinely is enough for now.
